overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city from the video game Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves along a covered sidewalk beneath elevated highways with holographic billboards, passing brutalist architecture before emerging into a sunlit intersection with digital advertising displays and futuristic traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: futuristic red sedan driving past on the multi-lane road to the left

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with visible support pillars and attached cables
glowing cyan and orange holographic billboards displaying abstract patterns
tall concrete building with vertical window slits and industrial aesthetic
enclosed walkway connecting to the office tower with metal railings
large cylindrical pillar supporting the overhead highway structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway in a futuristic city. Holographic advertisements glow overhead while the camera walks past concrete support pillars. A brutalist office tower with an attached pedestrian skybridge dominates the right side, and futuristic vehicles pass by on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with security grating on building facade

events.description: building facade transitions from concrete windows to metal security grating

agents.ego_description: continuing along the covered walkway passing the grated building section

entered.detail: building wall covered in diamond-pattern metal security grating

segments.scene_description: Continuing under the highway overpass, the building facade changes to a distinctive metal security grating. The concrete support pillars shift to the left as the camera progresses forward. The environment remains sheltered with holographic glow visible ahead, and traffic continues to pass on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban intersection with massive digital advertising

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into the open intersection
emerging from shadow of overpass into bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: stepping out of the covered area and walking into the sunlit intersection

notable_agents.action: futuristic vehicles navigating through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: massive pink and purple LED billboard displaying abstract graphics on building side
wide open plaza where multiple roads converge with visible crosswalks
tall futuristic towers visible in the distance beyond the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered walkway into a bright, open intersection. The lighting shifts dramatically from shadow to direct sunlight. A massive pink digital billboard dominates the right side of the frame, while skyscrapers rise in the distance. The elevated highway structure now appears to the left as the camera enters the crossing area.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection center with surrounding traffic and advertising towers

events.description: camera slows and comes to a stop near the blue sports car

agents.ego_description: slowing to a stop in the intersection near a parked blue vehicle, observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: blue sports car stopped in the intersection, facing perpendicular to the camera

entered.detail: sleek blue two-door sports car with black trim stopped in the road
tall vertical billboard displaying text advertisements on the right side of the intersection

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera slows to a stop in the middle of the intersection next to a blue sports car. The perspective shifts to show the surrounding brutalist architecture and towering advertising billboards. Traffic continues to flow around the stationary position, with the elevated highway structure now visible further to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a shadowed, industrial underpass into a brilliant, sun-drenched urban intersection. It begins on a covered sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway, passing concrete support pillars and a brutalist office tower while holographic advertisements glow overhead. As the camera progresses, the architecture shifts to a metal security grating and the pillars move to the left, maintaining a sheltered atmosphere amidst the flow of futuristic traffic. The scene then opens dramatically as the camera emerges from the walkway into direct sunlight, where the lighting shifts from deep shadow to a bright glare dominated by a massive pink digital billboard. Finally, the movement slows to a stop in the middle of the crossing next to a blue sports car, revealing a panoramic view of towering skyscrapers and brutalist structures under a clear sky.
